2.Title: Navigation & Tracking
2.Desc: Unlock Mount at Adventurer Lv.20. After equipping a mount, tap on a target to begin navigation!

3.Title: Auto Combo
3.Desc:
Auto Combo mode can be activated via a hotkey,
allowing the character to cast skills based on a preset logic.
In Auto Combo mode, you can still move, jump, and manually use skills without interrupting the auto combo.

Auto Combo settings are available.
Tap on skill icons to toggle their availability in auto-combos.

5.Title: Talents
5.Desc: The Talent system is the core mechanism that determines skill rotation and combat style. In the early game (Stage 1), basic talents help adventurers get familiar with the system. In Stage 2, you can choose a spec and develop it further.

8.Title: Talent Tips
8.Desc: You can use "Auto-Activate" feature to quickly activate the recommended Talents. You can also view Spec details in Guide.

10.Title: Rose Orb (Bound)
10.Desc: Rose Orbs (Bound) are a basic currency used to purchase various items in the Store and the Bound Orb Store, including fashion appearances, selected growth items, leisure items, and emote vouchers.

13.Title: Luno is a trading currency used for player-to-player transactions.

16.Title: Honor Coin
16.Desc: Honor Coins are an important progression currency. They can be used in the Honor Coin Store to purchase items that enhance your power!

19.Title: Reclaim Token
19.Desc: Asterleeds' special welfare currency! If you don't have enough points to redeem all of the week's compensatory rewards, you'll earn bonus Reclaim Tokens proportionally when earning Honor Coins through activities.

20.Title: Reclaim Hub
20.Desc: Missed certain challenges or rewards? You can redeem some items in the Reclaim Hub using Reclaim Tokens.

21.Title: Reclaim Hub Items
21.Desc: The Reclaim Hub dynamically updates available items and your Reclaim Tokens based on your activity and rewards earned.

22.Title: Tips
22.Desc: Season Levels can also be recovered through the Reclaim Hub.

24.Title: Easy
24.Desc: Anyone can complete the following activities with ease!

25.Title: Advanced
25.Desc: The following group activities also support solo and duo modes. Feel free to give them a try!

27.Title: Adventurer Level Catch-Up
27.Desc: All players below Lv.60 can claim a free Instant Lv.60 Boost.

28.Title: Season Level
28.Desc: Season Level Catch-up can be recovered through the Reclaim Hub.

30.Title: Resource Recovery
30.Desc: The [Reclaim Hub] allows you to recover some power-enhancing items.

33.Title: Ability Score
33.Desc: The Ability Score is a reference value used to assess your strength, affected by other factors in actual gameplay. Please interpret this value rationally.
